title: Humanoid Rupter
description: Rupters are small Parasites, but this one's different...
body:
# Humanoid Rupter
## Impact : 3

Rupters are small Parasites, but this one's different. From the front of their body, 5 tentacles emerge. Their entire body is of a grey, tending to black,

**(+)Leap:** You can use the [Primary key] to leap long distances!

**(+)Crawl:** You can use the [Secondary key] to turn climbing on/off

**(+)Tendrils:** You deal more damage with your bare tentacles then with a weapon; also you give the target Slowness 2 for 5 sec

**(+)Assimilation:** If you kill a player, they will transform into an Assimilated

**(=)Speed:** You move twice as fast as a player

**(=)Leftovers:** You can only consume experience.

**(-)Sizzling:** Hot: You die quicker in fire

**(-)Fragile:** You only have 5 hearts // 10.0 hitpoints

**(-)Slick:** Can't wear armor higher than chainmail

Destiny Fabrication official server: [Destiny Fabrication](https://discord.gg/hXncEcdxbn)
